  • Install

  • Hermes
  • GitHub

Hermetic

Import chat exports. Curate. Train LoRA. Personalize Hermes agents.

Get Started GitHub

📥 Import

ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Hermes exports normalized to unified Conversation schema

🔍 Curate

Exact/semantic deduplication, Presidio PII redaction, quality filtering

📝 Format

ShareGPT, DPO, GRPO, JSONL, Alpaca, HF Datasets — 6 formats ready

🏋️ Train

MLX LoRA on Apple Silicon; Unsloth/Axolotl cloud backends

🤖 Integrate

Hermes plugin: hermes hermetic import|train|status

Pipeline Overview

1

Import

ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Hermes exports → unified Conversation schema

2

Curate

Exact dedup, semantic dedup (embeddings), Presidio PII, quality filters

3

Format

ShareGPT, DPO, GRPO, JSONL, Alpaca, HF Datasets

4

Train

MLX LoRA on Apple Silicon; Unsloth/Axolotl cloud backends stubbed

5

Integrate

Hermes plugin: hermes hermetic import|train|status

Ready to Start?

Install Hermetic and run your first pipeline in minutes.

Get Started →

Hermetic — MIT Licensed | Built for Hermes Agent
